text_block_list.text:
McQueen and I continue to split our time between recruitment and 
training.

McQueen and I continue to split our time between recruitment and 
training.

However, our search for new team members bears no fruit, and 
McQueen remains the sole member of Sirius.
While that's a problem in and of itself, it's the least of my worries.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant…

McQueen has been going out late at night to train alone on an empty 
track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I just need to pick up the pace a little more!

As I expected, she clearly isn't satisfied with the regimens I've 
prepared.

As I expected, she clearly isn't satisfied with the regimens I've 
prepared.

The spring Tenno Sho is fast approaching, however. This extra strain 
poses a risk.

Should I tell her she needs to stop? Or should I accept the risk and 
make my sessions more rigorous?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I've no choice. No choice but to win the spring Tenno Sho!

What do I do? The old man would have known exactly what to say. If 
only he could help me.

The next day, I head to the office to prepare for training. There, I 
find McQueen waiting with unexpected company.
Hello! Hope you don't mind me!
choice_data_list: Could you be… a new recruit?!
Could you be… a new recruit?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, no. This is Mejiro Ryan, one of my dear family 
members.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It would appear that she wishes to speak to you about something, so I 
have brought her along.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice to meet you! It's kind of important, so I practically begged her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now if you'll excuse me, I have some potential teammates to recruit.
Huh? You're not joining in on the conversation?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It appears to be something of secrecy, so Ryan insisted that it just be the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know how much of a distraction I can be, so now let me make myself 
sparse.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! Any cheeky secrets you two want to keep are of no concern 
to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So please, by all means, take your time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Aww, looks like she got all jealous. It's not like I was going to 
steal her trainer away.
So what's this important conversation?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, well it's about McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've probably already noticed, but she's pushing herself way too 
hard.
choice_data_list: …Is this about her nighttime training sessions?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I knew you would have picked up on them. Yup, McQueen was right 
about you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: "A bit unreliable, but always looking out for me."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's how she always describes you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She even said that's why she'll stick with you until the end, no matter 
what happens.
Really? And here I thought that she didn't trust me at all.
Really? And here I thought that she didn't trust me at all.

I thought she was training alone because she was unsatisfied with my 
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nah, she really does trust you a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if I had to guess, her personal goals for the race are getting to 
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: See, when a race plays to our strengths, a Mejiro's expected to win it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know the family has high expectations for me when it comes to 
Classic races. McQueen is a stayer, so expectations are high for her to 
win the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Especially given how much the Tenno Sho means to the family. She 
wants to make everybody proud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Expectations for her to race in the Tenno Sho have existed since she was young. Under that pressure, McQueen probably feels like she has to win.
Ah, so that's why she's been training by herself every night.
Ah, so that's why she's been training by herself every night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I think she's worried, y'know? She's juggling the race and recruiting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She feels like it's on her to get it all perfect. Trust me, she's always 
been like this…

She's putting up a tough front. Maybe the extra training is her way of 
trying to cope.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So please, stop her before she hurts herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she would listen to anything you have to say if you explain it 
to her.
Yeesh, just what have I been doing all this time?
Gosh, just what have I been doing all this time?

All I did was move up the ranks a bit. I can't believe I let that cloud 
my vision.

Thank you, Ryan. You've helped me refocus on what's really 
important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen's like a little sister to me, but she's also an important rival.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll leave the rest to you!
